#SecClinton: We need the economic engine that #women represent in all of our countries. #APEC | More on http://t.co/UKm9plIx.
#SecClinton: Second, we are joining with expert partners to train central and commercial banks in inclusive lending practices. #APEC
#SecClinton: First, we want to help governments use their purchasing power to support #women entrepreneurs and grow their economies. #APEC
#SecClinton: Today, I'm announcing two new #APEC initiatives to expand #women's access to capital and markets.
#SecClinton: #APEC identified 4 areas for progress: access to capital, access to markets, skills & capacity building, & #women's leadership.
#SecClinton: Even when there are no legal barriers, social or institutional restrictions often hold #women back. #APEC
#SeClinton: According to the World Bank, there are more than 100 countries where certain laws are different for #women than men. #APEC
#SecClinton: #Women still face obstacles to economic participation in the Asia-Pacific and around the world. #APEC
#SecClinton: Limiting #women's economic potential is like leaving money on the table.  It just doesn't make sense. #APEC
#SecClinton: Women now represent 40% of global labor force, 43% of agricultural workforce, more than 50% of the world's university students.
#SecClinton: When #women participate more fully in their economies, everyone benefits. #APEC
#SecClinton: Nine months ago, #APEC members joined around a shared vision,  taking actions to increase #women's participation in economies.
#SecClinton: U.S., #Russia working to intensify our shared efforts in the Asia-Pacific -- including promoting the rights of #women. #APEC
#SecClinton: Like the U.S., #Russia is a #Pacific power that has the opportunity to play a constructive role in the region. #APEC
